title: Nokia Mod
description: This mod adds... The indestructible Nokias!
body:
### Nokia Mod

## Features
This mod adds
- Nokia: A powerful item that can be crafted into different things.
- Nokia Armor: An armor that holds huge resistance, and it's made of historic phones?
- Nokia Pickaxe: A powerful pickaxe and only pickaxe that includes flash speed!
- Nokia Bucket: The most strange of all! It's just a strong liquid. You can make strong objects with these!
- Nokia Dimension: Can be accessed by using the nokia dimension portal igniter and bedrock!
- Nokia Block: Found in the Nokia Dimension, not craftable
- Nokia Sword: Slays enemies with ease.

## Why To Download
If you need a cursed nokia mod or want to try something new. Well, this is for you!

## Extras
1. Everything in this mod is craftable and easy to use!
2. The nokia is NOT able to break bedrock! (Because nokia is so strong you can even break the server or world!)
   
## Compatibility
This mod supports Windows, macOS and Linux! So you can enjoy on every OS!

## Social Media
Youtube: https://youtube.com/@tsubasagamesdev?si=juilz7tDWyfR83yu

## Developer's Note
Please donate to me if you liked this mod! (You can do that in the buy me a coffee link and also it's not obligatory! But it would support me so much so i can keep going! Every amount counts.)

## Permissions
**This Mod Is Allowed To Be Used In Any Modpack But It's Not Allowed To Be Edited Or Copied.**
